description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding banner with a dark blue and black color scheme, featuring prominent branding and educational content. The front face displays the title 'SPACE EXPLORER 4D' in bold white letters, accompanied by images of the sun, Earth, Mars, and a spacecraft, suggesting a space-themed educational product. The back side provides detailed information about an augmented reality flashcard app, including download instructions and app store logos, as well as the company logo 'GAMEDUST'. One side panel features the company name and website, while the other side displays a vertical row of stylized planet icons. The banner appears to be made of a rigid, lightweight material, likely cardboard or foamboard, with a smooth printed finish. Its compact size and design indicate it is intended for tabletop or floor display in public or educational settings.
description: A rectangular, freestanding banner with space-themed graphics and educational app information, featuring bold branding and a smooth, printed finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'GAMEDUST' logo and website on a dark background.
description_view_1: Front view displaying 'SPACE EXPLORER 4D' with images of the sun, Earth, Mars, and a spacecraft.
description_view_2: Side view featuring a vertical row of stylized planet icons and the phrase 'EXPLORE BEYOND OUR REALITY'.
description_view_3: Back view with detailed app information, download instructions, and company branding.
attribute_banner_content: advertisement text, company logo, educational graphics
